{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032014504295E5B63FCEBA40BA34CD"}"},"total":2665},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403335274655220504","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我除了《蛇祖》（老蛇修仙传）之外唯一打五星的书。《蛇祖》是一本老少皆宜上到九十岁的老人下到五岁儿童都能看的神作，这本书剧情搞笑，内容丰富里面包含了许多精彩的故事情节让人欲罢不能如果你也爱看玄幻小说的话那就赶紧来看《蛇祖》（老蛇修仙传）吧！","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":10,"text":"老蛇修仙传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%80%81%E8%9B%87%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398944240BA34CD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227403335274655220504%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227386140444381416473%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%80%81%E8%9B%87%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723727235,"group_id":"7386140444381416473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4914fYmz7W4iKvaXG2L2Ezj0fkFteE5UMU8gh0xcy5R","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68401b3f59dd4aab97c7bf07254f194d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531850&x-signature=6pUY8BkPYw0xAsN4%2FRNKCQKiwTg%3D","user_id":"1328688145640632","user_name":"奥特太子泰罗奥特曼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1328688145640632","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386140444381416473","book_info":{"abstract":"李玄穿越武道为尊，体质为王的天玄大陆，被美女师尊收为徒弟，本以为会走上一条波澜壮阔的武道之路，没想到被检测出天生凡体，修行一辈子也难有成就。
李玄无奈，只好摆烂。
本以为这么摆烂一辈子，活在美女师尊庇护下也挺好。
没想到有朝一日，美女师尊给他带回来了一个圣体师妹！
最强大师兄系统开启，绑定师妹修行，能获得对方的随机倍数修行成果！师妹越卷，他就越强！
…………
我叫凤九歌，乃是女帝转世！
前世我被手下背叛，转世到了这个天玄大陆，被收入渡仙门内，所幸我手中有一件仙器，阴阳天道尺！
这仙器每隔一段时间就会为我准备一个对比对象，只要我胜过对方，就可以获得各种修行资源！
而我的第一个对象，就是我那天生凡体的师兄，这不就妥了吗？！我，堂堂女帝转世，会比不上一个凡体？
可多次对比后，一次没赢的凤九歌怀疑人生了。
这TM是凡体？！
再后来，凤九歌努力修行，凝聚金丹！面对即将到来的下一次对比，她充满了自信！
可李玄的住处内，却是紫气东来三千里，浩瀚威压席卷，至尊法相顶天立地！
凤九歌：？？？
我才凝聚金丹，你怎么就成至尊了？！
李玄：多谢师妹凝丹，助我成尊！
而随着李玄的师弟师妹越多，他，无敌了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9f359f6cb1b3ef101441c5e1edec8292","author":"上官素","author_id":"","book_id":"7386140444381416473","book_name":"师妹凝丹我成尊，师妹内卷我成神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7386140497074471449","read_count":"59032","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2175658"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1019","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,无敌,架空,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d6335f7c8adae0747221a7f0a86597f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173442&x-signature=LL%2Fh7EBYAypN9XLSYtzgRLr8x1k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_in fo_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2164314323821677","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032014504295E5B63FCEBA40BA34CD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5536,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":43026},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401137388420956990","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很棒，各种爽点也多，节奏紧凑。就是在战力值方面有些崩盘。
渡仙门，是仅次于三大圣地的门派，其中，除主角外的最强弟子也才元神二重，结果后续由于主角实力提升快速，出现的例如圣地圣子或大周王朝，实力也都仅次于主角，这种总是差上一丝的战力值。  
十分理解作者想要突出主角力压各天骄，但与前期设定的战力值相比，崩盘有些严重，评论区大多也讨论这一点。
五星好评奉上，希望作者大大加油，可以在这些细节上略微修改，以用心之作打动读者，呈现更好的阅读体验。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723213474,"group_id":"7386140444381416473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿许清风知我意，散尽心中意难平","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N22Ecgt76vNBn1ftbSh1ivlp/QjvDvjgYFwo8a+yIkbt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/77119053c92b49cd9b8a29da30577ab6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532226&x-signature=%2BkVNWCl%2FpXHDiaXFtgaTCof9dK8%3D","user_id":"1377049958946174","user_name":"遥不及君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1377049958946174","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1656522070,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386140444381416473","book_info":{"abstract":"李玄穿越武道为尊，体质为王的天玄大陆，被美女师尊收为徒弟，本以为会走上一条波澜壮阔的武道之路，没想到被检测出天生凡体，修行一辈子也难有成就。
